parsed_review.summary: CP00-548 is a clean descriptor-only closeout pack for RP17.P09.M05.S09-S18 ("Permission And Audit Binding", 9 implementation + 1 claude_review = 10 units, risk class A). Independent source inspection confirms the pack-level claim is fully supported and not overclaimed: manifest declares production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:"descriptor"; the production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verification token gated behind human final approval. Implementation (registry.js pack binding/no-write attestation/requirements, service.js case-set+descriptor builders with freezeCp548Result applying all no-runtime/no-write flags, validators.js coverage/slice/Hermes/Claude/handoff functions, index.js wildcard re-exports), tests (3 model.test.js blocks), the RP17 validator script assertions, the contract projection, and the closeout plan/next-pack-queue all agree (source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65..., live_latest CP00-547, next unit S09). All recorded validation gates exit 0 (command-evidence.json + H17), with closeout-pack:validate and receipt steps correctly deferred as post-review-gated. No fs/child_process/network/eval/process.env usage exists anywhere in package src; functions are pure frozen data builders. Authority boundaries hold: claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false, hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false (Hermes used only for descriptor review-packet/receipt evidence, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false). Review-evidence integrity passes CP178+ hardening: auth-preflight exit 0 with non-zero valid-JSON stdout, prompt 2131B under limit, read-only tools only (Read/Grep/Glob), forbidden_tools_present:false. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/*, docx, ldip) are correctly classified outside pack scope. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result/adjudication/construction-inspection/receipt) are appropriately absent because this read-only run precedes them in the hardening sequence. No defects found at any severity.
